headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays handed the Los Angeles Angels one of the largest losses in franchise history with a 14-1 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, including a home run, and 4 RBIs. In other action, the Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. San Francisco Giants right-handed pitcher Logan Webb has also been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 6, 2026, with right knee bursitis. The Houston Astros have transferred right-handed pitcher Hunter Brown from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list with a right shoulder strain.

The San Francisco Giants made a key trade addition, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Suffer Historic Loss to Blue Jays**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels 14-1, handing them one of the largest losses in franchise history. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, including a home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound. Civale earned the win with 5.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Reds in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a 1-3 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with Braden Shewmake leading the Astros' offense with a home run and an RBI. Spencer Arrighetti pitched 5.2 innings for the Astros, striking out five batters and allowing one earned run.

top_news.title: **Marlins Walk Off in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Miami Marlins edged out the Washington Nationals 8-7 in a closely contested game. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Place Brock Stewart on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. The injury occurred on May 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson in a trade with the Cleveland Guardians on May 9, 2026. Wilkinson joins the Giants in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
